nx_follow.description: Follow a Steam game to receive its news on a specific channel.

messages.success: Steam news for the game **{game_name}** (`{app_id}`) will now be published in {channel}.
messages.not_found: The game `{game}` was not found on Steam.

nx_unfollow.description: Unfollow a Steam game to stop receiving its news.

messages.success: The game **{game_name}** (`{app_id}`) will no longer be followed in {channel}.
messages.not_followed: The game `{game}` is not being followed.

nx_publish.description: Publish the latest news of a followed Steam game in its associated channel (for testing).

messages.success: The latest news for the game **{game_name}** has been published in {channel}.
messages.not_found: No news found for the game **{game_name}**.

nx_list.description: Lists all followed Steam games with their channel.

nx_reset.description: Unfollow from all followed Steam games to stop receiving any news.

messages.success: {total} games will no longer be followed.
